package.name: pc2_to_livox
package.description:
Convert a sensor_msgs/PointCloud2 (e.g. a MuJoCo lidar sim, or any PointXYZI cloud) into a livox_ros_driver2/CustomMsg so a downstream Livox-native SLAM (Point-LIO / FAST-LIO2, lidar_type=1) can consume it.
Built for the Orin NX / Orin Nano HIL benches where the laptop simulates the physical world: MuJoCo emits PointCloud2, this node repackages it as the raw Mid-360 CustomMsg stream the onboard SLAM expects, and ros1_bridge forwards it to the Jetson. C++ for throughput (runs at 10 Hz on full clouds without hogging the sim host).
Pure converter: no Livox-SDK, no driver binary. Depends only on the CustomMsg/CustomPoint definitions from the livox_ros_driver2 (msgs-only) package.
